notes: Hotfix on top of v0.4.0. Track-selection carousel now centers as a window panel (was off-screen). Arena reactions overhauled — every kick spawns an edge ripple, every 4 downbeats drops a pulse ring, every 8 downbeats rolls a fresh wall layout, energy orbs spawn twice as often. Rotating laser duty-cycles (14s on / 6s rest) instead of always-on, and stands down during low-energy zones + long breaks. PAINT mode: splotches no longer leak through to the menu after a match; alpha lowered so ships read better. flow_velocity restored to ARENA pool.
